prompts.name: Natural Makeup
prompts.text: Use natural makeup with subtle skin enhancement, soft lip color, and light eye definition.

prompts.name: Soft Glam
prompts.text: Use soft glam makeup with polished skin, gentle eye shading, and flattering highlights.

prompts.name: Smokey Eye
prompts.text: Use tasteful smokey eye makeup with controlled shadow, defined lashes, and dramatic elegance.

prompts.name: Rosy Makeup
prompts.text: Use rosy makeup with warm cheeks, soft lips, and a fresh romantic appearance.

prompts.name: Glossy Lips
prompts.text: Add glossy lips with natural reflections, soft color, and polished finish.

prompts.name: Matte Lips
prompts.text: Use matte lip color with clean edges, soft texture, and refined style.

prompts.name: Winged Eyeliner
prompts.text: Use winged eyeliner with clean shape, sharp definition, and stylish character.

prompts.name: Soft Eyeshadow
prompts.text: Use soft eyeshadow with gentle blending, flattering color, and natural depth.

prompts.name: Fantasy Makeup
prompts.text: Use fantasy-inspired makeup with subtle shimmer, unusual color accents, and elegant magical styling.

prompts.name: Gothic Makeup
prompts.text: Use gothic makeup with darker tones, defined eyes, and dramatic but tasteful presentation.

prompts.name: Idol Makeup
prompts.text: Use bright idol-style makeup with sparkling highlights, cheerful color, and polished stage-ready charm.

prompts.name: Editorial Makeup
prompts.text: Use editorial makeup with bold but controlled styling, refined color design, and fashion-forward impact.

prompts.name: No-Makeup Look
prompts.text: Use a no-makeup look with fresh skin, subtle natural tones, and believable facial detail.

prompts.name: Glitter Accents
prompts.text: Add subtle glitter accents near the eyes or cheeks for sparkling detail without overwhelming the face.

prompts.name: Clean Skin Finish
prompts.text: Use clean skin finish with balanced texture, natural highlights, and soft flattering detail.
